title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Software Engineer to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd!
